projects.name: Contract Summary Template
projects.description: Auto-generates plain-English contract summaries from AAR purchase contracts for buyer/seller review

versions.notes: Initial release with AAR purchase contract parsing and plain-English summary generation

projects.name: CMA Report Generator
projects.description: Generates real estate review and CMA reports using the StoryBrand SB7 narrative framework from ARMLS MLS data

versions.notes: Equity calculations, market analytics engine, SB7 narrative polish
Initial release with ARMLS PDF parsing and basic CMA generation

upNext.notes: Team-accessible upload flow so Jacqui can generate reports independently

projects.name: STR Analyzer
projects.description: Short-term rental investment underwriting calculator with cash-on-cash returns, cost segregation tax savings, and multi-deal modeling

versions.notes: Public investor view with shareable slug URLs
Supabase integration, PDF export, cost segregation with OBBBA 100% bonus depreciation
Initial release with mortgage calculator, amortization, and basic deal analysis

upNext.notes: PDF export polish, multi-property portfolio view

projects.name: Tenet Commission Calculator

versions.notes: Initial release with 7-tier commission tracking, closed deals and pipeline, localStorage persistence

versions.notes: Kanban dashboard, idea submission with Claude parsing, SSE build plan generation, password auth
